Brief information on interfaces in route mode:
Interface            Link   Speed      Description
GE1/0/1              UP     1G         Uplink to Core
GE1/0/2              UP     1G         Link to Access-SW1
GE1/0/3              DOWN   auto
GE1/0/4              UP     10G        Server Farm Link
XGE1/0/1             UP     10G        Uplink to Distribution
XGE1/0/2             DOWN   auto
LoopBack0            UP     -          Management Loopback
LoopBack1            DOWN   -          Backup Loopback
